title: Alert Trends Over Time (Part 2)
summary: Apply alert trends over time in real ZAP workflows with guided steps, examples, and practice.
content:
# Alert Trends Over Time (Part 2)

## Overview
Apply alert trends over time in real ZAP workflows with guided steps, examples, and practice.

## Key ideas
- Keep scope explicit before running scans.
- Prefer safe defaults when testing new targets.
- Capture evidence for every significant finding.

## Workflow
1. Define scope and choose the right mode.
2. Run the scan or action for this topic.
3. Review alerts and validate results.

## What to watch for
- Out-of-scope requests or unexpected targets.
- Missing coverage in dynamic sections.
- False positives that need manual validation.
examples: Run alert trends over time on a staging target and compare alerts.
Document one alert with evidence and remediation notes.
objectives: Explain how alert trends over time fits into ZAP testing.
